---
title: "Interactive Data Science Tools"
output:
  html_document
---

Some fun and useful interactive math tools, brought to you by Drs. [Smits](https://stat.uw.edu/people/georgia-smits/) and [Smits](https://math.ua.edu/people/robert-smits/), and converted into pretty HTML pages with help from Claude AI.

<br>

## Categories {.tabset}

### Linear Algebra
* [Cholesky Decomposition](interactive_tools/linear_algebra/cholesky.html)
* [LU Decomposition](interactive_tools/linear_algebra/lu-decomposition.html)
* [QR Decomposition](interactive_tools/linear_algebra/qr-full.html)
* [Row Reduction](interactive_tools/linear_algebra/row-reduction.html)

### Optimization
*Stay tuned! More tools are in the pipeline for this section.*

### Probability and Statistics
*Stay tuned! More tools are in the pipeline for this section.*

### Topology
*Stay tuned! More tools are in the pipeline for this section.*
